positive: A stylized, maximalist arrangement of celestial bodies and abstract nature elements: crescent moons, shooting stars, ethereal nebula cloud formations, blooming bioluminescent lotus flowers, and wispy cosmic dust rendered in vibrant jewel tones. The composition should be radially balanced and highly detailed, designed for a central repeat print on apparel. Use a clean, stark black background for maximum contrast, emphasizing the luminous, glowing forms. The style should evoke psychedelic Art Nouveau mixed with modern scientific illustration, utilizing deep indigo, electric cyan, neon magenta, and emerald green accents. High contrast, clean line work, vector-art quality, cinematic, volumetric lighting, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, low detail, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, grainy, monochrome, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, celebrity likenesses, poorly drawn
